description: Curated 100-example subset of the iter-6 CLUTRR absent-relation (no-derivation) pool. Each row is a per-query record with the closure certificate prediction, four confidence-thresholded RAW-ABSTAIN baseline predictions (verbalized / sc_margin / ptrue / negent), the raw LLM commit, gold (always no-relation), and the four confidence-signal values. Reader model google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite.
